decision_log.reason: orchestrator picks up files by glob; eliminates index-vs-file drift; matches v3-core SKILL.md output contract
decision_log.tradeoffs: 1-file-per-task increases file count to 100 but simplifies session boot (1 read), atomic updates, and merge conflicts

decision_log.decision: Use a Python generator (scripts/_generate_branch_packages.py) instead of static JSON commits
decision_log.reason: 100 file machine generation removes copy-paste drift; the generator IS the source of truth and re-runs are idempotent
decision_log.tradeoffs: Pure-Python (zero external deps) is portable across CI runners; jinja2 adds a dep without payoff for this shape

decision_log.decision: Wave assignment: W1=21 backend, W2=8 backend, W3=1 backend, W4=25 UI, W5=30 UI, W6=15 drift
decision_log.reason: v3-core 'backend-first → UI-second' within Wave is impractical at 30 task-per-Wave scale; instead, separate the layers across Waves and let UI Waves W4/W5 list dependent backend tasks in depends_on. Drift fix runs last (W6) after UI lands.
decision_log.tradeoffs: Phase 1 timeline becomes longer in wall-clock but each Wave is uniform-layer, simplifying mutex check and parallel boot

decision_log.decision: depends_on uses task_id strings (not wave/group fields)
decision_log.reason: Orchestrator's session scheduler is task-id keyed; using string ids lets a dependency cross Waves cleanly (e.g., T-V3-C-01 depends_on T-V3-B-01)
decision_log.tradeoffs: Per-task deps slightly more verbose but enables fine-grained restart

decision_log.decision: final_state seeded to 'pending'; mutated by auto-merge job
decision_log.reason: Matches SKILL.md schema; the auto-merge job (integration skill) transitions 'pending' → 'auto-merged' / 'retried' / 'escalated' / 'rolled_back'
decision_log.tradeoffs: Explicit initial state simplifies state-machine verification in CI

decision_log.decision: ci_gates list is the BF profile 8-gate set (lint-mock, AC-validator, RLS-coverage, audit-md, pytest-cov-70, pyright, tsc, mock-impl-diff)
decision_log.reason: v3 BF profile fixes N=8; backend / UI / drift all subject to the same gate set (gates self-skip when irrelevant, e.g., tsc on pure-backend PR)
decision_log.tradeoffs: Uniform 8-gate set keeps auto-merge logic stateless

decision_log.decision: work_package_boundary patterns: backend slug-by-feature_id, UI slug-by-screen_id, drift category-specific
decision_log.reason: FastAPI modular monolith + Next.js app-router map cleanly to feature- and screen-scoped paths; drift fixes touch a known small set (schema/migration/openapi/screens.json)
decision_log.tradeoffs: Slug patterns are predictable for boundary-lint #16 but may need per-task overrides once tickets-group-*.json land — generator is the override point

decision_log.decision: spec_links and required_reads always reference the (not-yet-committed) Phase 1 ticket files
decision_log.reason: branch-package.json is consumed BY orchestrator AFTER tickets land; pinning paths now keeps files self-contained on arrival
decision_log.tradeoffs: Path-pinning lets orchestrator fast-fail with a clear 'missing ticket' error vs. silently degrading

open_questions: tickets-group-b-backend.json / tickets-group-c-ui-part*.json / tickets-group-d-drift.json have not been committed yet; once authored, re-run scripts/_generate_branch_packages.py and diff to detect drift

wave-schedule.json under docs/schedule-design/2026-05-16_v3/ is not present; orchestrator must treat Wave dependency graph (W1→W2→W3→W4→W5→W6) as implicit from .claude/branches/_index.json until schedule-design lands
openapi.yaml is not present under docs/api-design/; backend tasks reference docs/api-design/ as readonly placeholder — adjust on api-design output

immediate: After merge: orchestrator boots W1 = 21 sessions via .claude/branches/T-V3-B-{01..21}.json
long_term: Phase 1 closeout = all 100 final_state ∈ {auto-merged, escalated} with no retried/rolled_back pending
